name: io.github.aliboIly/tripwire
title: Tripwire
description: MCP for Roblox Studio and Open Cloud: drive Studio, run headless tests, and review game security.

environmentVariables.name: ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Open Cloud API key. Needed for the headless test and Open Cloud tools; the Studio path does not use it.

environmentVariables.name: ROBLOX_UNIVERSE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Universe id the Open Cloud tools target. Set it alongside the key and place id.

environmentVariables.name: ROBLOX_PLACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Place id the Open Cloud tools target. Set it alongside the key and universe id.
